title: Integration of CRISPR-engineering and hiPSC-based models of psychiatric genomics.
author: Matos MR Ho SM Schrode N Brennand KJ
content: S-EPMC7484226 PMC7484226 Integration of CRISPR-engineering and hiPSC-based models of psychiatric genomics.
